content:
Post 1
⛏️ Materials ripped +2.30% while Healthcare bled -1.93% — the ASX 200 split session in two. Index closed +29.70pts at 8,823.00, crossing its 20-day MA, still 4.13% off the 52-week high. #ASX #ausbiz

Post 2
🔺 Materials +2.30% and Energy +1.67% carried the day. Healthcare -1.93% and A-REIT -1.44% dragged. Classic risk rotation: hard assets in, defensives out. Seven of eleven sectors finished in the red. #ASX #mining #energy

Post 3
PDN surged +6.66% to AUD 9.13 — uranium back in focus as energy names caught a bid. Paladin was the clearest signal that the commodity rotation had real conviction behind it today, not just noise. #ASX #uranium #energy

Post 4
🪙 Gold at AUD 5,886.31/oz with AUD/USD at 0.6989. Silver AUD 85.01/oz. A softer Aussie dollar amplifies every metals move — gold miners had the wind at their backs today. #ASX #gold #silver #mining

Post 5
Watch the AUD/USD 0.70 handle. A break above flips the metals tailwind. Gold sitting at AUD 5,886/oz is partly a currency story. Does the Aussie reclaim 0.70 this week, or do materials bulls get another free ride? #ASX #ausbiz #gold #FX
